title: Senior Doctor - Bayer India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bayer India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
